finding_results.evidence: chapters/chapter_02.md:127; chapters/chapter_02.md:129; chapters/chapter_02.md:143; chapters/chapter_02.md:155; chapters/chapter_02.md:161; chapters/chapter_02.md:163; chapters/chapter_02.md:169
finding_results.notes: The sequence now establishes why Carmen catches the meeting tonight: she is only present at 1:10 because she picked up the overnight double, and the residents are audible because the discrepancy has made them speak too sharply. Earl's concealment move is shown on the page when he folds the papers and slides them under Harry's wheelchair cushion. Lola's incontinence crisis forces Carmen into immediate hands-on care, giving Harry and Earl credible time to reset the lamp, remove the chair, and clear the room before Carmen returns.
finding_results.summary: Rebuilt the 1 a.m. discovery turn so the access, concealment, and room reset all operate through visible cause-and-effect rather than convenient disappearance.

summary: Revised chapter 02's discovery sequence to resolve the packet's structural/craft concern with explicit physical mechanics and a credible cleanup delay.
